title: Misclassifications of Earnings: What is a common misclassification in accounting that can affect...
summary: Analyze an investment analysis concept related to Misclassifications of Earnings.
prompt: What is a common misclassification in accounting that can affect earnings?

options.text: A common misclassification in accounting is the treatment of capital expenses,
It has no effect on net income

solution: A common misclassification in accounting is the treatment of capital expenses, such as R&D, as operating expenses. This can skew the estimation of both operating and net income, leading to inaccurate portrayals of a firm's profitability and financial health. This issue is highlighted in the provided materials, particularly on pages 4 and 5.
